query: UPDATE users SET role = 'admin' WHERE open_id = (SELECT value FROM site_settings WHERE key = 'owner_open_id' LIMIT 1) OR open_id IN (SELECT open_id FROM users ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1);
